message:
chore: remove stale generated vector_ops.zig

This file was an unused artifact - the actual @logic_table workflow is:
1. Python source: benchmarks/vector_ops.py
2. metal0 compiles to: lib/vector_ops.a
3. Linked via addObjectFile() in build.zig

The checked-in file was not imported anywhere and contained
outdated generated code using numpy interpreter calls instead
of native SIMD operations.
